rationale: Section 25.035 governs inter-district student transfers and proportional fund transfers. It does not reference homestead exemption amounts, property tax appraisals, or Tax Code §11.13(b). No direct or consequential conflict.
quote: the participating governing boards shall also agree to the transfer of school funds or other payments proportionate to the transfer of attendance.
_note: Rule text concerns student transfer mechanics and associated fund transfers; no dependency on homestead exemption dollar thresholds.
